finding_results.notes: Replaced the meta-book reference with an in-world seasonal anchor tied to the first week of the freeze.
Converted the cited clipped beats into grammatically complete sentences while preserving urgency and stakes.
Restructured the transfer-prep span so an intake-document obstacle (county transfer number requirement) forces a new tactical plan before the 4:10 time check; checklist handling was compressed.
Kept one explicit abstract formality marker and shifted the other two beats to concrete delivery/action cues.

Trimmed repeated institutional recital and made leverage/fear land through one concrete mechanism (supervised nursery access threat) plus immediate bodily and decision-state beats.

summary: Chapter 16 now resolves all packet findings by replacing meta/process leakage and clipped narration, strengthening causal architecture in the discovery-to-leverage turn, introducing a concrete transfer obstacle that changes scene decisions, reducing repetitive formality labeling, and sharpening confrontation stakes through concrete procedural threat and embodied response while preserving continuity and voice constraints.
